title: ED moves Delhi High Court against Arvind Kejriwal's acquittal in case over skipping summons
description: The Enforcement Directorate (ED) has approached the Delhi High Court against a trial court's acquittal of Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) chief Arvind Kejriwal for failing to comply with the summons issued to him under the Prevention of Money Laundering Act (PMLA) in the excise policy case. Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma is scheduled to hear the matter on April 1, Wednesday. Additional Chief Judicial Magistrate (ACJM) Paras Dalal of the Rouse Avenue Courts had acquitted Kejriwal in the case i
